examples: The directions and degrees of the lumbar isthmic and degenerative spondylolisthesis had statistically evident difference.
Objective: to study the ct diagnostic value and clinical applications of ct scans parallel to isthmic in isthmic defect of lumbar spine.
Isthmic spondylolisthesis does not always cause immediate symptoms of pain. When it does, it usually manifests as a deep ache in the lower back.
